location.geofencecollection.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Location::GeofenceCollection` resource specifies the ability to detect and act when a tracked device enters or exits a defined geographical boundary known as a geofence.

location.geofencecollection.CollectionNa.Description: A custom name for the geofence collection.  Requirements:  + Contain only alphanumeric characters (A–Z, a–z, 0–9), hyphens (-), periods (.), and underscores (_). + Must be a unique geofence collection name.+ No spaces allowed. For example, `ExampleGeofenceCollection`.

location.geofencecollection.Description.Description: An optional description for the geofence collection.

location.geofencecollection.KmsKeyId.Description: A key identifier for an [AWS KMS customer managed key](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/create-keys.html). Enter a key ID, key ARN, alias name, or alias ARN.
